description: Use this API to run the time series power flow solution. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = tspf(profile, starttime, endtime, tol, optacc, label, dfxfile, accfile, inlfile, zipfile)
python_syntax: ierr = tspf(profile, starttime, endtime, tol, optacc, label, dfxfile, accfile, inlfile, zipfile)

parameters.name: starttime
parameters.description: Start time point. when start time point is less than 0, all time points are simulated. (input; -1, by default).

parameters.name: endtime
parameters.description: End time point. when end time is less than start time, only start time point is simulated. (input; -1, by default).

parameters.name: tol
parameters.description: Is the mismatch tolerance. (input; Newton solution convergence tolerance, TOLN, by default).

parameters.name: optacc
parameters.description: An array of 11 elements specifying solution options. The values are as follows:. (input).

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Is the name of the generation dispatch subsystem (blank by default, no default allowed if options(10) is not 0). (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Is the name of the distribution factor data file. (input).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Is the name of the contingency solution output file. (input).

parameters.name: inlfile
parameters.description: Is the name of the unit inertia and governor data file. (input).

parameters.name: zipfile
parameters.description: Is the name of the zip archive output file. (input).

optacc.description: tap adjustment flag (tap adjustment option setting by default).
area interchange adjustment flag (area interchange adjustment option setting by default).
enable using tie line flows only in calculating area interchange.
enable using tie line flows and loads in calculating area interchange.
phase shift adjustment flag (phase shift adjustment option setting by default).
dc tap adjustment flag (dc tap adjustment option setting by default).
switched shunt adjustment flag (switched shunt adjustment option setting by default).
enable continuous mode, disable discrete mode.
non-divergent solution flag (non-divergent solution option setting by default).
induction motor treatment flag (applied when an induction motor fails to solve due to low terminal bus voltage).
induction machine failure flag (0 by default).
treat contingency as non-converged if any induction machines are placed in the “stalled” or “tripped” state.
treat contingency as solved if it converges, even if any induction machines are placed in the “stalled” or “tripped” state.
do not write a ZIP archive file.
write a ZIP archive using the file specified as ZIPFILE.

error_codes.description: no error occurred.
invalid TOL value.
invalid OPTIONS value.
generators are converted.
generation dispatch subsystem is not defined.
buses with bus type code and series element status inconsistencies.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
too many islands in base case.
no Distribution Factor Data File specified.
no TSPF Output File specified.
no ZIP Archive Output File specified.
No profile curve sets defined.
Profile curve set not found.
No profile curves defined in profile curve set.
Time point not found in the profile curve set.
No profile data defined.
file DFXFILE is not in the form of a PSSE 25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
monitored elements exceed limit when adding multi-section line members.
error opening TSPF Solution Output File.
error opening Distribution Factor Data File.
error opening Unit Inertia and Governor Data File.
error opening ZIP Archive Output File.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
